title: Cactus Wood
description: Make green wood & variants from cactus!
body:
Welcome to Cactus Wood! 

This mod adds green Cactus Wood crafted from Cactus Ribs, which are in turn crafted from vanilla cactus. Additionally, there is a set of Cactus Tiles for more variety.

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
